description: Audit allowlist for known-accepted npm advisories. Each entry must have a justification and expiration date.

allowedAdvisories.justification: jsPDF used only for local PDF export; no user-supplied HTML/untrusted input processed. Monitoring for upstream fix.
DoS risk accepted — local desktop app, no server-side exposure.
Path traversal not exploitable — app generates PDFs from internal data only.
AcroForm not used in our PDF exports. No user-controlled form fields.
BMP decoder not used — app does not process BMP images via jsPDF.
XMP metadata injection — app controls all metadata, no untrusted input.
Race condition in addJS — plugin not used in our export flow.
